systemPrompt: Chains that cross tool domains: math to text, email to text to logic

steps.prompt: Add 15 and 27, then check if the result is even. Answer only true or false.
Extract the email from 'Contact us at admin@example.org for details', then get the domain, then return the length of the domain. Answer only with the number.
Get the length of the text 'automation', then check if that number is even. Answer only true or false.
